PreToolUse.description: Block any write to raw/ — sources are immutable

PostToolUse.description: Auto git commit after any write to wiki/

FileChanged.description: Notify when a new file appears in raw/ — suggest ingest

hooks.command: jq -r '"New file in raw/: " + .file_path + ". Say \"ingest\" to process it."'

Stop.description: Suggest lint when 5 or more ingests have occurred since the last lint
System notification when the agent finishes (macOS/Linux)

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "wiki-wonka done" with title "wiki-wonka"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'wiki-wonka' 'Operation complete' 2>/dev/null || true
